cases.prevention: copy to a unique temporary file and atomically promote only verified bytes
cases.detection: temporary files and digest mismatch fail verification
cases.response: remove the exact temporary file and repeat from verified source bytes
cases.db10a_proof: interrupt a fixture copy and prove no content-addressed object appears

cases.prevention: the key contains the full SHA-256 and existing objects are never overwritten
cases.detection: existing bytes must match the claimed digest
cases.response: stop and preserve both inputs outside the authoritative object tree
cases.db10a_proof: precreate mismatched bytes and prove publication rejects them

cases.prevention: inventory and object hashes are recorded after every backup
cases.detection: full verification rejects changed or missing bytes
cases.response: replace the corrupt copy from a verified source before release activation
cases.db10a_proof: change a copied fixture byte and prove verification fails

cases.prevention: there is no automatic deletion and retained releases have no TTL
cases.detection: inventory comparison reports a missing object
cases.response: restore the missing object from the source or another verified copy
cases.db10a_proof: remove a test object and prove inventory verification fails

cases.prevention: every accepted backup includes active rollback-1 and rollback-2 manifests
cases.detection: backup acceptance counts and verifies all three releases
cases.response: restore into a clean directory and compare every manifest and object hash
cases.db10a_proof: restore three fixture releases into a clean directory and verify exact hashes

cases.prevention: free space is checked before copy and partial files are not authoritative
cases.detection: the backup command exits nonzero before or during a copy
cases.response: leave the prior accepted backup unchanged and free or add space before retrying
cases.db10a_proof: prove the configured free-space floor is checked

cases.prevention: backup failure never changes the source or active release
cases.detection: the preflight cannot resolve or write the configured local root
cases.response: leave active state unchanged and retry when forest1 storage is available
cases.db10a_proof: use an unavailable test path and prove fail-closed behavior
